about.metaDescription: Learn about Shenyang Shining Road Technology, a manufacturer of cold mix asphalt, pavement sealcoat, and asphalt additives.
about.title: Tentang Kami
about.subtitle: Shenyang Shining Road Technology Co., Ltd.
about.lead: We are a professional manufacturer and technology provider specializing in pavement maintenance products: cold mix asphalt, pavement sealcoat, and asphalt additives. Headquartered in Shenyang, China, we serve contractors, distributors, and manufacturers in over 30 countries.
sections: Our business covers three focused product families: cold mix asphalt, pavement sealcoat, and asphalt additives.
Pavement maintenance is one of the highest-ROI investments in infrastructure. Our mission is to make high-quality maintenance materials accessible in every market.
Every batch undergoes in-house laboratory testing before release, including raw materials, production process checks, finished product certification, retained samples, and third-party verification.
We export to more than 30 countries and support distributors, contractors, asphalt plants, and road maintenance teams worldwide.
about.ctaText: Baik Anda distributor, kontraktor, atau produsen, kami dapat membahas cara mendukung bisnis Anda.

contact.responseText: Kami berupaya merespons dalam 24 jam pada hari kerja (Sen-Jum, UTC+8).

standard-cold-patch.title: Aspal Campuran Dingin Standar — Perbaikan Lubang Segala Cuaca
standard-cold-patch.description: High-performance cold mix asphalt for permanent pothole and utility cut repairs. Ready to use straight from the bag with no heating, mixing, or tack coat required.
features: Permanent repair, not a temporary patch

capsule-pressure-cold-patch.title: Capsule Pressure-Sensitive Cold Patch — Teknologi Perbaikan Cerdas
capsule-pressure-cold-patch.description: Smart cold patch with pressure-sensitive capsules that release binder under compaction, so repairs strengthen under traffic while reducing sticking to tires and tools.
features: Reduced sticking to tires and tools
Suitable for wet and cold repairs

black-pavement-sealcoat.title: Black Pavement Sealcoat — Coal Tar & Emulsi Aspal
black-pavement-sealcoat.description: Professional black pavement sealcoat for asphalt protection and beautification, available in coal tar and asphalt-emulsion formulas.

color-pavement-sealcoat.title: Color Pavement Sealcoat — Coating Anti-Selip & Dekoratif
color-pavement-sealcoat.description: Color anti-skid pavement sealcoat for asphalt and concrete surfaces. A 0.5–1.5 mm decorative protective coating with multiple colors.
features: Strong adhesion to asphalt and concrete

specifications.label: Colors
specifications.value: Red, green, blue, yellow, black, custom

cold-mix-additive.title: Cold Mix Asphalt Additive — Konsentrat Generasi ke-3
cold-mix-additive.description: Concentrated additive for manufacturing high-performance cold mix asphalt with water resistance, low-temperature workability, and long storage stability.

asphalt-recycling-agent.title: Asphalt Recycling Agent — Rejuvenasi Perkerasan Tua
asphalt-recycling-agent.description: Recycling agent for rejuvenating aged asphalt binder in reclaimed asphalt pavement and old asphalt surfaces.
features: For hot in-place and plant-mix recycling

warm-mix-additive.title: Warm Mix Asphalt Additive — Turunkan Suhu Produksi
warm-mix-additive.description: Warm mix additive reduces asphalt mixture production temperature by 30–50°C to save energy, lower emissions, and improve workability.
